list.name: dbml-generator
list.description: Transforms the Prisma schema into Database Markup Language (DBML) which allows for an easy visual representation

list.name: docs-generator
list.description: Generates an individual API reference for Prisma

list.name: json-schema-generator
list.description: Transforms the Prisma schema in JSON schema

list.name: typegraphql-prisma
list.description: Generates TypeGraphQL CRUD resolvers for Prisma models

list.name: typegraphql-types-generator
list.description: Generates TypeGraphQL class types and enums from your Prisma type definitions; the generated output can be edited without being overwritten by the next gen and has the ability to correct you when you mess up the types with your edits.

list.name: nestjs-graphql
list.description: Generates object types, inputs, args, etc. from the Prisma schema file for usage with @nestjs/graphql module

list.name: prisma-appsync
list.description: Generates object types, inputs, args, etc. from the Prisma schema file for usage with @nestjs/graphql module

list.name: generator-nestjs-dto
list.description: Generates DTO and Entity classes with relation connect and create options for use with NestJS Resources and @nestjs/swagger

list.name: erd-generator
list.description: Generates an entity relationship diagram

list.name: prisma-class-generator
list.description: Generates classes from your Prisma Schema that can be used as DTO, Swagger Response, TypeGraphQL, and so on.

list.name: zod-prisma
list.description: Creates Zod schemas from your Prisma models.

list.name: prisma-pothos-types
list.description: Makes it easier to define Prisma-based object types, and helps solve n+1 queries for relations. It also has integrations for the Relay plugin to make defining nodes and connections easy and efficient.

list.name: prisma-joi-generator
list.description: Generate full Joi schemas from your Prisma schema.

list.name: prisma-yup-generator
list.description: Generate full Yup schemas from your Prisma schema.

list.name: prisma-class-validator-generator
list.description: Emit TypeScript models from your Prisma schema with class validator validations ready.

list.name: prisma-zod-generator
list.description: Emit Zod schemas from your Prisma schema.

list.name: prisma-trpc-generator
list.description: Emit fully implemented tRPC routers.

list.name: prisma-json-server-generator
list.description: Emit a JSON file that can be run with json-server

list.name: prisma-trpc-shield-generator
list.description: Emit a tRPC shield from your Prisma schema.

list.name: create-prisma-generator
list.description: Everything you need to build your Prisma generator like an elite open-source maintainer

list.name: prisma-redis-middleware
list.description: This is a Prisma middleware used for caching and storing of Prisma queries in Redis (uses an in-memory LRU cache as fallback storage).

list.name: prisma-cache-middleware
list.description: With this middleware you can cache your database queries into the Redis (one of the fastest in-memory databases for caching) and reduce your database queries.

list.name: prisma-auth
list.description: A declarative authorisation middleware that operates on Prisma model level (and not on GraphQL resolver level).

list.name: prisma-slug
list.description: A slugification middleware for Prisma. It generates slugs for your models by using other model attributes with logic that you can define.

list.name: prisma-mongo-json-schema-generator
list.description: A generator, which takes a Prisma 2 schema.prisma and generates a JSON Schema in flavor which MongoDB accepts

list.name: prisma-util
list.description: Merge multiple files, create model inheritance and abstraction and create cross-file relations. Additionally, generate schemas using code, configure your data source using YAML and XML and more.

list.name: adonis-prisma
list.description: This package provides you with Prisma Client Provider and Auth Provider for working with Prisma and Adonis.js

list.name: prisma-event-dispatcher
list.description: Dispatches several types of events while working with Prisma models. EventEmitter agnostic, and allows you to choose for what kind of models, actions and moment of lifecycle to emit the events, configure your data source using YAML and XML and more.

list.name: react-admin
list.description: Open-source, low-code framework that accelerates the development of admins, dashboards, and B2B apps.

list.name: bun-mock-prisma
list.description: A simple and type-safe mocking utility for Prisma Client in Bun tests.

list.name: prisma-valibot-generator
list.description: The Prisma Valibot Generator creates Valibot schemas directly from your Prisma models. It provides type-safe Full, Create, and Update validators with zero boilerplate. Lightweight, tree-shakeable, and built for Prisma 6.12+ and Node.js 18+.

list.name: idb-client-generator
list.description: The Prisma IndexedDB Client Generator creates a Prisma-like client for IndexedDB. It brings familiar Prisma syntax and CRUD operations to local browser storage. Ideal for web apps needing structured offline data with a type-safe API.

list.name: prisma-query-formatter
list.description: This small zero-dependency utility correctly formats Prisma queries by substituting placeholders with their corresponding values, support all databases including PostgreSQL.

list.name: prisma-rls
list.description: Row-Level Security (RLS) traditionally requires databases with native support and custom security policies for each table. This library provides an alternative: a Prisma client extension that automatically adds "where" clauses to all model queries. This method works without database-side RLS support (e.g., in MySQL).

list.name: prisma-admin
list.description: A powerful, framework-agnostic admin panel for Prisma ORM with full TypeScript support. Automatically generate CRUD interfaces for your Prisma models with advanced features like inline editing, custom actions, file uploads, and comprehensive permission control.

list.name: eav-to-prisma
list.description: Transform flexible EAV database structures into type-safe, performant Prisma schemas

list.name: prisma-qb
list.description: A Lightweight but powerful query builder that removes the need to manually write sorting, searching, and filtering logic in backend services.

list.name: prisma-sql
list.description: Speed up Prisma reads 2-7x by executing queries via postgres.js or better-sqlite3 instead of Prisma's query engine.

list.name: zod-prisma-gen
list.description: A simple Prisma generator that creates Zod validation schemas.
